subject: A young planeswalker in green and red robes stands in a sunlit forest clearing, gesturing with one raised hand while a small dog-like spirit companion sits beside him on a tree branch or rock.
description: A dark-haired man in earthy green robes with red and gold trim stands in a verdant forest clearing, one hand raised with fingers spread in a casting or summoning gesture. A small yellow-orange canine companion (a spirit dog) sits attentively at his side, ears perked. The figure has an alert, focused expression and faces three-quarter toward the viewer. Behind him, sun-dappled trees and bright green foliage fill the frame, with patches of bright sky breaking through the canopy. The overall palette is dominated by lush greens with warm accents of orange, gold, and red on the figure and the dog. Lighting is soft and natural, suggesting daytime in a wild forest setting.
foreground: robed man with raised hand and small canine companion
background: sun-dappled forest clearing with bright green foliage and patches of sky
emotion: focused, calm, attentive bond between man and companion
